scripts.prod:local: npm run build && npm run preview:prod
scripts.prod:local:restart: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $procId = $conn[0].OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" && npm run build && npm run preview:prod -- --strictPort
scripts.port:4173:free: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $procId = $conn[0].OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Port 4173 was freed' } else { Write-Output 'Port 4173 already free' }"
scripts.pm2:start: npm run port:4173:free && npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only carservice-preview
scripts.pm2:restart: npm run port:4173:free && npm run build && pm2 restart carservice-preview --update-env
scripts.pm2:autostart:install: schtasks /Create /TN "carservice-pm2-resurrect" /SC ONLOGON /TR "cmd /c cd /d C:\Проекты\Код\carService && npx pm2 resurrect" /F
